name: Aasimar
description: Aasimar are mortals touched by celestial power, bearing a spark of the divine that manifests as radiant beauty or unearthly grace.

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.description: As a Magic action, you touch a creature and roll a number of d8s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains Hit Points equal to the total rolled. Once used, you can't use this trait again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.description: When you reach character level 3, you can transform as a Bonus Action (lasts 1 minute; once per Long Rest). Choose one form: Necrotic Shroud (frighten nearby creatures, deal extra Necrotic damage), Radiant Consumption (shed bright light, deal extra Radiant damage), or Radiant Soul (gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed).

name: Dragonborn
description: Dragonborn are humanoids with draconic heritage, bearing the power of dragons in their blood and breath.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a dragon type (Black, Blue, Brass, Bronze, Copper, Gold, Green, Red, Silver, or White). This choice determines your Breath Weapon damage type and Damage Resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, exhale destructive energy in a 15-foot cone or 30-foot line (your choice at character creation). Each creature in the area makes a Dexterity saving throw (DC = 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency Bonus) or takes 1d10 damage of your ancestry's type (increases at levels 5, 11, and 17). Usable Proficiency Bonus times per Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.description: When you reach character level 5, you can use a Bonus Action to manifest spectral wings and gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed for 10 minutes. Usable Proficiency Bonus times per Long Rest.

name: Dwarf
description: Dwarves are solid and enduring as the mountains they love, weathering centuries with iron will and dry humor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have resistance to Poison damage and Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again at each subsequent level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching one to use this trait. Usable Proficiency Bonus times per Long Rest.

name: Elf
description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in the world but not entirely part of it.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: Choose a lineage: Drow (Darkvision 120 ft, Dancing Lights cantrip, Faerie Fire at level 3, Darkness at level 5), High Elf (Detect Magic cantrip, Misty Step at level 3, Arcane Eye at level 5), or Wood Elf (Speed 35 ft, Druidcraft cantrip, Longstrider at level 3, Pass without Trace at level 5). CHA or INT is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition. Magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep. Instead you meditate deeply for 4 hours a day, gaining the same benefit a human does from 8 hours of sleep.

name: Gnome
description: Gnomes are small, curious, and energetic, with a delight in discovery that makes them natural tinkerers and explorers.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.description: Choose a lineage: Forest Gnome (Minor Illusion cantrip, Speak with Animals once per Long Rest using INT) or Rock Gnome (proficiency with Tinker's Tools, can craft Tiny clockwork devices that produce sounds, light, or simple effects).

name: Goliath
description: Goliaths are massive, strong, and competitive, having descended from giants or blessed by their power.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a giant type and gain the associated benefit: Cloud (Misty Step once per LR), Fire (resistance to Fire damage), Frost (resistance to Cold damage), Hill (Advantage on saves vs. Poison; resistance to Poison damage), Stone (60 ft Tremorsense as Bonus Action, 10 min, PB times per LR), or Storm (resistance to Lightning and Thunder damage).

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: When you reach character level 5, you can use a Bonus Action to become Large for 10 minutes (once per Long Rest). While Large, you have Advantage on Strength checks and your Speed increases by 10 feet.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push or drag.

name: Halfling
description: Halflings are small, nimble folk with an extraordinary capacity for luck and a talent for going unnoticed.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, though you can't stop there.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

name: Human
description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people in the world, with a diversity of cultures and a drive that shapes history.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You gain an Origin feat of your choice (see the list of Origin feats in the rules).

name: Orc
description: Orcs are mighty warriors with a fierce competitive drive and a resilience that carries them through the hardest of battles.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Usable Proficiency Bonus times per Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once used, you can't use this trait again until you finish a Long Rest.

name: Tiefling
description: Tieflings carry the legacy of a fiendish pact or possession, bearing infernal features and otherworldly power.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description: Choose a legacy: Abyssal (resistance to Poison, Poison damage trait, Darkness and Fly spells at L3/L5), Chthonic (resistance to Necrotic, False Life trait, Ray of Enfeeblement and Darkness spells at L3/L5), or Infernal (resistance to Fire, Hellish Rebuke trait, Darkness at L5). CHA is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

name: Dwarf
description: Dwarves are solid and enduring as the mountains they love, weathering centuries with iron will and dry humor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Accustomed to life underground, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.description: You gain proficiency with the artisan's tools of your choice: smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus to the check.

traits.name: Subrace — Hill Dwarf
traits.description: +1 WIS. Dwarven Toughness: your HP maximum increases by 1 and increases by 1 again at each subsequent level.

traits.name: Subrace — Mountain Dwarf
traits.description: +2 STR. You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

name: Elf
description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in the world but not entirely part of it.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day.

traits.name: Subrace — High Elf
traits.description: +1 INT. You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list (INT-based). You gain one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Subrace — Wood Elf
traits.description: +1 WIS. Speed increases to 35 ft. Mask of the Wild: you can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured by natural phenomena.

name: Halfling
description: Halflings are small, nimble folk with an extraordinary capacity for luck.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Subrace — Lightfoot
traits.description: +1 CHA. Naturally Stealthy: you can attempt to hide even when obscured only by a creature larger than you.

traits.name: Subrace — Stout
traits.description: +1 CON. Stout Resilience: advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

name: Human
description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people, diverse and driven.

traits.name: Ability Score Increase
traits.description: Your ability scores each increase by 1.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Extra Skill
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one additional skill of your choice.

name: Dragonborn
description: Dragonborn are humanoids with draconic heritage, bearing the power of dragons in their blood and breath.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a dragon type (Black, Blue, Brass, Bronze, Copper, Gold, Green, Red, Silver, or White). This sets your Breath Weapon damage type and Damage Resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: Use an action to exhale destructive energy. Creatures in the area make a Dexterity saving throw (DC = 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 damage (scales with level). Usable once per short or long rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

name: Gnome
description: Gnomes are small, curious, and energetic, with a talent for tinkering and magic.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: You have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Subrace — Forest Gnome
traits.description: +1 DEX. Natural Illusionist: you know the Minor Illusion cantrip (INT-based). Speak with Small Beasts: communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.name: Subrace — Rock Gnome
traits.description: +1 CON. Artificer's Lore: add twice your proficiency bonus to History checks related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices. Tinker: proficiency with Tinker's Tools; craft tiny clockwork devices.

name: Half-Elf
description: Half-elves blend the best of human ambition and elven grace, at home in two worlds yet fully belonging to neither.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

name: Half-Orc
description: Half-orcs carry the ferocity of orcs and the tenacity of humans, proving themselves through strength and sheer will.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. Once used, you can't use this trait again until you finish a long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

name: Tiefling
description: Tieflings carry the legacy of an infernal pact, bearing fiendish features and hellish power.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. At level 3, you can cast Hellish Rebuke as a 2nd-level spell once per long rest. At level 5, you can cast Darkness once per long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.
